calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Hometwon Medical Supplies LLC

Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Ashar Ahmed, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) SF Royal Medical Supply, Inc. present in court with witness Gretta Mejikovskaya. No appearance by defendant Hometwon Medical Supplies LLC Petitioner sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff SF Royal Medical Supply, Inc. and against the defaulted defendant Hometwon Medical Supplies LLC, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $128,241.15
Prejudgment Interest - $12,824.11
Costs - $649.35
Total - $141,714.61
